ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cpd_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CPD activity */,
  "activity_code" TEXT /* Code representing the type of CPD activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the CPD activity */,
  "criteria_notes" TEXT /* Criteria or explanatory notes regarding the CPD activity */,
  "cpd_hours" TEXT /* CPD hours granted for the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the CPD activity (e.g., meeting, presentation, publication) */,
  "activity_date_range" TEXT /* Date range during which the activity is valid */,
  "approval_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the activity requires approval before CPD hours are granted */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the activity */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Full name of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "membership_date" TEXT /* Date the member joined the organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the member belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the member within the organization */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the member */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the member logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cpd_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CPD record */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who completed the activity */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CPD activity completed */,
  "date_completed" TEXT /* Date the CPD activity was completed */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or comments by the member */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the CPD record (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "hours_claimed" REAL /* Number of hours claimed by the member */,
  "hours_approved" REAL /* Number of hours approved by the reviewer */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback on the CPD record */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the CPD record */,
  "reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CPD record was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cpd_records_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES admin_users ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cpd_records_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES cpd_activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cpd_records_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the admin user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin user (e.g., reviewer, approver) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the admin user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the admin user within the organization */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the admin user logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cpd_claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CPD claim */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member submitting the claim */,
  "total_hours_claimed" REAL /* Total CPD hours being claimed */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the claim (e.g., approved, denied, under review) */,
  "claim_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the claim */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback on the claim */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the claim */,
  "reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the claim was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cpd_claims_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cpd_claims_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES admin_users ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
